findings.message: PII logged: owner_email is marked as PII in models.py with comment 'do not include in logs or external responses' but is being logged in the item_created event.
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from the log statement. Log only non-PII fields like item_id: log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id)
